creator: zoujingzhou.zoujingzhou@huawei.com
text:
when we install the freebsd 11.1, it can't find floppy drive at the loader prompt, so we can't install raid driver by the floppy. it differs from freebsd 11.2 and 10.x before.

freebsd11.1 named the partition "partX: xxx blocks" which can't be used by command "load partX:xxx.ko" and can't found the ko module.

However,the freebsd 11.2 named the partition "diskX: xxx blocks" which can be used by "load diskX:xxx.ko"
